query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN taskId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as comTaskId, SUM(CASE WHEN customTaskTitle IS NOT NULL AND customTaskTitle != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as comCustomTitle, SUM(CASE WHEN taskMode = 'biblioteca' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as modoBiblioteca, SUM(CASE WHEN taskMode = 'personalizada' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as modoPersonalizada, SUM(CASE WHEN taskMode = 'livre' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as modoLivre, SUM(CASE WHEN taskMode = 'sem_tarefa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as modoSemTarefa FROM mentoring_sessions WHERE taskStatus IN ('entregue', 'nao_entregue');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN taskId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as comTaskId, SUM(CASE WHEN customTaskTitle IS NOT NULL AND customTaskTitle != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as comCustomTitle, SUM(CASE WHEN taskMode = 'biblioteca' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as modoBiblioteca, SUM(CASE WHEN taskMode = 'personalizada' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as modoPersonalizada, SUM(CASE WHEN taskMode = 'livre' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as modoLivre, SUM(CASE WHEN taskMode = 'sem_tarefa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as modoSemTarefa FROM mentoring_sessions WHERE taskStatus IN ('entregue', 'nao_entregue');
